title: Meeting Stress Leaderboard
purpose: Rank meetings or meeting clusters by biometric elevation versus local baseline.
privacy_default: Redact titles and use role labels, pseudonyms, or attendee counts.
minimum_coverage: At least 5 meetings with overlapping biometric samples.

title: Attendee Effect Board
purpose: Estimate per-attendee marginal effect with regularized rankings and confidence labels.
privacy_default: Pseudonymize attendees and suppress rows below the minimum n threshold.
minimum_coverage: At least 3 meetings per displayed pseudonym.

title: Recovery Gate
purpose: Compare readiness and sleep against today or tomorrow's calendar load.
privacy_default: Show minutes and blocked windows, not event names.
minimum_coverage: Current readiness or sleep plus upcoming calendar availability.

title: Calendar Load Skyline
purpose: Show meeting density by weekday and hour so the user can see recurring load peaks.
privacy_default: Show occupancy bars and day/hour buckets, not event names or attendees.
minimum_coverage: At least one week of calendar events.

title: Day Shape Barcode
purpose: Compress sleep, stress, calendar, email, and food timing into one scan-friendly row.
privacy_default: Use counts, bars, and meal letters only.
minimum_coverage: At least two domains present for the day.

title: Workload Outcome Matrix
purpose: Bucket meeting and email load against stress, sleep, or readiness outcomes.
minimum_coverage: At least 30 days with calendar/email and one biometric outcome.

title: Sleep Debt Heatstrip
purpose: Highlight sleep debt, bedtime drift, and recovery pressure across a rolling window.
privacy_default: Show daily scores and drift labels only.
minimum_coverage: At least 7 nights of sleep data.

title: Baseline Drift Board
purpose: Compare recent resting heart rate, HRV, SpO2, and sleep baselines against a prior period.
privacy_default: Show period aggregates and deltas only.
minimum_coverage: At least 14 recent days and 14 comparison days.

title: Stress Waterfall
purpose: Show how daily stress accumulates and where recovery resets reduce the load.
privacy_default: Show source buckets, not event titles or locations.
minimum_coverage: At least one day with stress samples.

title: Workout Recovery Lane
purpose: Compare workout timing and intensity with same-day strain and next-day readiness.
privacy_default: Show workout type and intensity bucket only.
minimum_coverage: At least 5 workouts with next-day readiness.

title: Chronotype Planner
purpose: Turn tomorrow's first meeting and recent sleep need into a target bedtime window.
privacy_default: Show meeting time blocks, not titles or attendees.
minimum_coverage: Recent sleep need plus tomorrow calendar availability.

title: Coverage Trust Ledger
purpose: Show whether each data domain is complete enough to trust a result.
